modelVersion.description: Version date for the static preview content model.

id.description: Stable content id for the phase.

direction.description: Whether this phase belongs to the inbound (Panama/Argentina to Wichita) or outbound (Wichita to Panama) program, or is shared by both (e.g. post-program sharing).

claimStatus.description: Claim status from the RITE research package's claim_status_legend. needs_confirmation material must not be published.

sourceNote.description: Optional human-readable note on where this phase's facts came from.

lastVerified.description: ISO date this phase's facts were last verified against source material.

productionMapping.note: Static preview content only. In the future .NET API / SQLite model, each phase maps to a reviewed ProgramCyclePhase entity tied to a given ProgramYear/Exchange record. claimStatus, sourceNote, and lastVerified map to fields on that entity's verification record.
